Our Authors

Six pen names. Six distinct voices. Find your next read.

Ash Wilder

Dark, intense MM BDSM and paranormal romance where desire and danger collide.

Explore

Nyx Montreaux

Mafia romance dripping with danger, obsession, and heat.

Explore

Rook Brennan

MM monster romance and dark fantasy — creatures with sharp edges and the men brave enough to want them.

Explore

Clay Daintry

MM cowboy romance with grit, heat, and wide-open country.

Explore

Jay McGilvery

Sports romance — locker rooms, rivalry, and the kind of chemistry that breaks records.

Explore

Rita Dole

MF monster romance and reverse harem dark fantasy — dark, daring, and seriously spicy.
